sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, values Tuple(a Float64, b Float64));
UPDATE test_table SET values = tupleDivideByNumber(values, 2.0) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, tupleDivideByNumber(values, 5.0) AS divided_values FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE test_results AS SELECT tupleDivideByNumber(values, 10) FROM test_table;
